  <entry>
    <id>tag:status.claude.com,2005:Incident/30821519</id>
    <published>2026-07-07T21:47:40Z</published>
    <updated>2026-07-07T21:47:40Z</updated>
    <link rel="alternate" type="text/html" href="https://status.claude.com/incidents/l9zyw879cyd6"/>
    <title>Elevated errors for some models</title>
    <content type="html"><p> <small>Jul <var data-var='date'> 7</var>, <var data-var='time'>21:47</var> UTC</small><br> <strong>Update</strong> - We are continuing to work to resolve an issue resulting in elevated errors on requests to some models, primarily Claude Fable 5. We will provide an additional update as soon as possible. </p> <p> <small>Jul <var data-var='date'> 7</var>, <var data-var='time'>20:28</var> UTC</small><br> <strong>Identified</strong> - We have seen success rates return to normal, but we are continuing to work to fully resolve this issue and ensure no further recurrences. </p> <p> <small>Jul <var data-var='date'> 7</var>, <var data-var='time'>20:02</var> UTC</small><br> <strong>Investigating</strong> - We are investigating elevated errors on requests to some models. We will provide an update as soon as possible. </p></content>
  </entry>
  <entry>
    <id>tag:status.claude.com,2005:Incident/30810121</id>
    <published>2026-07-07T15:52:01Z</published>
    <updated>2026-07-07T15:52:01Z</updated>
    <link rel="alternate" type="text/html" href="https://status.claude.com/incidents/d23j8s7t8rx2"/>
    <title>Claude Tag seeing elevated GitHub operation failures</title>
    <content type="html"><p> <small>Jul <var data-var='date'> 7</var>, <var data-var='time'>15:52</var> UTC</small><br> <strong>Resolved</strong> - Our team is observing a lower error rate after these changes. We will continue investigating in-case we observe any spikes. </p> <p> <small>Jul <var data-var='date'> 7</var>, <var data-var='time'>15:30</var> UTC</small><br> <strong>Update</strong> - Our team has made some changes to update the load to GitHub, that we think will reduce this error rate. </p> <p> <small>Jul <var data-var='date'> 6</var>, <var data-var='time'>21:49</var> UTC</small><br> <strong>Investigating</strong> - We are currently investigating elevated error rates on calls made Claude Tag. Our team is actively working to identify the root cause. You may experience errors such as GitHub operations denied. </p></content>
  </entry>
